generated_oml:
instance RaspberryPiSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi sensor used for indoor air quality monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:producedData AirQualityDataTransmitted
]

instance AirQualityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom RaspberryPiSensor
]

instance AirQualityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Indoor air quality data collected from Raspberry Pi sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData AirQualityDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AzureCloudEnabler, TimescaleDBEnabler
]

instance AutomationMLModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "AutomationML-based digital twin model for indoor air quality management"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AzureCloudEnabler, TimescaleDBEnabler
]

instance AzureCloudEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Microsoft Azure cloud services for data management and processing"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService, SimulationService, PredictionService
]

instance TimescaleDBEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "TimescaleDB for historical data storage and retrieval"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService
]

instance MQTTBrokerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT Broker for inter-service communication between digital components"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService, SimulationService, PredictionService, HistoricalDataLoggingService, OptimalControlService, ContinuousValidationService
]

instance VersioningInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight for model version control"
]

instance ModelVersioningService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for version control of digital twin models"
    DTDFVocab:provides VersioningInsight
]

instance GitHubVersionControl : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "GitHub for version control of digital twin models and code"
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelVersioningService
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time and historical data visualization service for indoor air quality management"
    DTDFVocab:provides RuntimeVisualizationInsight
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation service for indoor air quality scenarios"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationInsight
]

instance PredictionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Prediction service for virus spread based on air quality data"
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictionInsight
]

instance HistoricalDataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for logging historical air quality data to TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalDataInsight
]

instance OptimalControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for optimal control adjustments of air quality management systems"
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlAction
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for continuous validation between physical and digital systems"
    DTDFVocab:provides ValidationInsight
]

instance RuntimeVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of indoor air quality data for decision-making"
]

instance SimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Simulated scenarios for indoor air quality management"
]

instance PredictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictions for virus spread based on air quality data"
]

instance HistoricalDataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Historical data records for system performance analysis"
]

instance ControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic adjustment of air quality management systems based on optimal control"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Continuous validation ensuring alignment between physical and digital systems"
]

instance C4Model : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "C4 Model for system architecture visualization"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo VirtualMachineEnabler
]

instance VirtualMachineEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Virtual machines for containerization and dissemination of digital twin services"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService, SimulationService, PredictionService, HistoricalDataLoggingService, OptimalControlService, ContinuousValidationService
]

instance PhysicalCrane : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Lab-scale gantry crane structure and controller"
]

instance PhysicalCraneInterface : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Python program connecting to crane controllers for data collection"
]

instance LoggingApplication : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Application for logging air quality data to TimescaleDB"
]

instance MQTTBroker : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "MQTT Broker facilitating inter-service communication"
]

instance LabScaleGantryCraneEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains PhysicalCrane, RaspberryPiSensor, PhysicalCraneInterface, LoggingApplication, MQTTBroker
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands are generated by the Control Application (Python) and transmitted through the Physical Crane Interface to the physical crane. Specific command types, message formats, validation and authentication mechanisms, feedback systems, conflict resolution, and command execution confirmation details are not provided in the document."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The system employs the C4 Model for architectural visualization, adopts an ad-hoc approach without a commercial digital twin framework, utilizes containerization and virtualization technologies for deployment, and integrates components including InfluxDB for time-series data storage, ActiveMQ for message brokering, AutomationML for digital twin modeling, and Microsoft Azure services for cloud-based pipeline implementation."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The system uses an MQTT broker for inter-service communication among digital components, including the Trajectory Generator Service, Simulation Service, and Continuous Validation Service. Network topology is based on the MQTT Broker connecting these services. Specific bandwidth, latency requirements, reliability, redundancy mechanisms, and security protocols are not detailed in the document."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Integration with external systems via the AutomationML standard for interoperability, Microsoft Azure cloud services for data processing and pipeline implementation, and ActiveMQ message broker for real-time data exchange between physical sensors and digital components."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "AutomationML standard is utilized for the digital twin representation in the Air Quality Management exemplar, with Microsoft Azure tools implementing the digital twin pipeline."
]
